issues.description: First effect trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but is missing the cost specification. The DSL does not encode the 'DON!! −2' cost mechanism. The card uses Main phase activation with DON cost, which should be represented in the cost field, not as a separate Trigger action.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'GiveDon' is not supported by the card text. There is no effect that grants DON!!. This appears to be erroneous.
Rest action target uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but the card specifies 'up to 1', meaning this is optional. The maxCost constraint of 5 is correct, but optionality may not be properly encoded.
